description: Enemy-penalty A/B stat panels (Martin, 2026-07-03). Same participants; RIGHT report the enemy activated pet skills Enemy Defense Penalty -5% and Enemy Lethality Penalty -3.5%. Own side (Marlinman) buffs active both times: attack pool 17% (10 item + 7 pet), defense pool 16% (10 item + 6 pet), health 6% (pet).
rule_confirmed: displayed = (1 + permanent) x (1 + sum own buffs) / (1 + sum enemy penalties) - 1. Enemy penalties are a DIVISOR. Hypothesis race RMS pct-points: divisor 0.034, multiply-(1-p) 2.020, subtract-from-pool 3.746.
notes: Attack and Health rows identical across A/B (no attack/health penalty active) - clean control.
The enemy's own displayed stats unchanged by turning on their penalty pets (penalties hit the opponent only).
At PvP-typical small percentages divisor ~= subtraction, which is why earlier PvP fits worked; at 3.5-5% measured to 0.1 precision the divisor is exact.
Code updated: reports.standard_pool()/assemble.assemble_battle() now use the divisor form.
